title: Fix Critical Backend Bugs: Orders API, Migration MetaData Error, Blog Migration Category
description:
Fix 3 critical bugs blocking production:

1. GET /api/v1/admin/orders/{id} returns 404
   - Endpoint missing or route not registered
   - Check backend/app/api/v1/admin/router.py
   - Verify orders router is included

2. Migration crash: 'MetaData' object has no attribute 'get'
   - File: backend/app/api/v1/admin/migration_service.py:403
   - Line: if not metadata.get("information_done"):
   - Issue: job.metadata has wrong type (SQLAlchemy MetaData instead of dict)
   - Fix: proper type annotation and handling

3. Missing blog migration category in admin
   - Add MigrationEntity.BLOG or reuse existing entity
   - Ensure blog posts migration is tracked separately
   - Update admin migration status endpoint
acceptance_criteria: Blog migration tracked in admin panel
